mapper.select: SELECT usp.*, cc.category_name, cc.icon_code FROM USER_SPENDING_PATTERNS usp INNER JOIN CARD_CATEGORIES cc ON usp.category_id = cc.category_id WHERE usp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY usp.monthly_amount DESC
SELECT category_id FROM USER_SPENDING_PATTERNS WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY monthly_amount DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: MERGE INTO USER_SPENDING_PATTERNS usp USING DUAL ON (usp.user_id = #{userId} AND usp.category_id = #{categoryId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET monthly_amount = #{monthlyAmount}, source = #{source}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_id, category_id, monthly_amount, source, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{monthlyAmount}, #{source}, SYSDATE)
